response.justification: The candidate has roughly 14 years of solid full-stack software development experience, but the role calls for a Director-level Principal Engineer with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and cloud/AI strategic leadership. The resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and no evidence of principal-level influence, AI products at scale, or advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background
Long track record of shipping across web, mobile, embedded
Community contributions via talks, workshops, and OSS
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No principal/director-level scope or strategic advisory experience
Limited cloud-platform depth beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
